<script lang="ts" setup>
import {onMounted} from "vue";
//const userInfoStore = UserInfo(piniaInstance);
const closeAction = () => {
  //关闭浏览器情况数据
  window.onbeforeunload = async (evt) => {
    evt.preventDefault();
    // userInfoStore.logout();
    // await userLogout(userInfo || {});
  };
};
onMounted(() => {
  closeAction();
});
